label: A안 — 인물 + 구체 사건 + 짧은 텍스트 (승리 공식)
prompt_en: Photorealistic portrait of Kevin Warsh, new Federal Reserve Chairman, in a dark navy suit, standing at the FOMC podium with a stern determined expression and furrowed brow, pointing firmly at the viewer. Behind him, a massive red digital stock ticker display showing '9000' with a cracking/fracturing effect spreading through the numbers. Dramatic moody lighting with deep shadows, tension atmosphere, bright highlights on his face contrasting with dark background. CRITICAL COMPOSITION RULE: The lower half of the frame is reserved for text overlay. The bottom 53% of the image (more than half the total frame height) must be pure solid black (#000000) completely empty flat void. This is larger than a typical half-and-half split. The gradient transition starts at the 45% line (from top) and must be fully solid black by the 60% line. The remaining bottom 40% is 100% pure black with absolutely zero visual elements — no gradient, no texture, no shadows, no details, pure #000000 flat void. Think of it as: TOP ZONE (upper 47% height) contains ALL the imagery and subject, BOTTOM ZONE (lower 53% height) is a dedicated solid black text panel. Prioritize this composition rule above aesthetic balance.

label: B안 — 차트/오브젝트 중심
prompt_en: Photorealistic dramatic image of a giant stock market chart showing KOSPI index soaring to 9000, but the chart line is visually splitting into two diverging paths — one going up (labeled with semiconductor chip icons) and one crashing down. A lone small figure of a retail investor in casual clothes stands at the fork point looking confused, dwarfed by the massive chart. Red and gold warning lights illuminate the scene. Dark navy and deep red color palette with dramatic tension lighting. CRITICAL COMPOSITION RULE: The lower half of the frame is reserved for text overlay. The bottom 53% of the image (more than half the total frame height) must be pure solid black (#000000) completely empty flat void. This is larger than a typical half-and-half split. The gradient transition starts at the 45% line (from top) and must be fully solid black by the 60% line. The remaining bottom 40% is 100% pure black with absolutely zero visual elements — no gradient, no texture, no shadows, no details, pure #000000 flat void. Think of it as: TOP ZONE (upper 47% height) contains ALL the imagery and subject, BOTTOM ZONE (lower 53% height) is a dedicated solid black text panel. Prioritize this composition rule above aesthetic balance.

label: C안 — 와일드카드 (다른 인물)
prompt_en: Photorealistic dramatic portrait of Shin Hyun-song, Bank of Korea Governor, in a formal dark suit, with a deeply worried and conflicted expression, one hand gripping a large interest rate dial/lever. Behind him, two contrasting scenes split by a diagonal crack: on one side, a glowing green semiconductor chip (representing KOSPI rally), on the other side, stacks of red debt documents and housing icons (representing household debt pressure). Intense dramatic lighting with gold highlights against dark navy background, creating strong tension. CRITICAL COMPOSITION RULE: The lower half of the frame is reserved for text overlay. The bottom 53% of the image (more than half the total frame height) must be pure solid black (#000000) completely empty flat void. This is larger than a typical half-and-half split. The gradient transition starts at the 45% line (from top) and must be fully solid black by the 60% line. The remaining bottom 40% is 100% pure black with absolutely zero visual elements — no gradient, no texture, no shadows, no details, pure #000000 flat void. Think of it as: TOP ZONE (upper 47% height) contains ALL the imagery and subject, BOTTOM ZONE (lower 53% height) is a dedicated solid black text panel. Prioritize this composition rule above aesthetic balance.
